Klein Moretti.eye_color: brown (turns deep black during divination or Cogitation)
Klein Moretti.primary_clothing: Silk hat, black Victorian suit, holding a black cane
Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline, giving off a distinct scholarly air
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, brown eyes that turn deep black during divination, holding a silver-inlaid black cane
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: Hears illusory whispers of 'Hornacis... Flegrea...' when near Antigonus-related locations
Klein Moretti.accessories: Dark gold member cufflinks with Hermes root word for 'fortune-teller' inscribed, topaz pendant hanging from his sleeve
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Details on his new club membership items and tools.

Benson Moretti.primary_clothing: Linen shirt, black coat, halved top hat
Benson Moretti.face_description: Resembles Klein but lacks the scholarly air, looks older than his actual age due to work stress.
Benson Moretti.visual_anchor: mid-20s male, pale skin, short black hair, wearing working class Victorian attire, showing signs of fatigue
Benson Moretti.source_notes: Seen tapping a plain cane while negotiating rent.

Melissa Moretti.hair_style: black hair that reached down her back
Melissa Moretti.primary_clothing: grayish-white long dress that had been mended several times, old veiled hat
Melissa Moretti.visual_anchor: teenage female, pale skin, long wavy black hair, wearing a simple, slightly worn Victorian dress
Melissa Moretti.color_palette: faded blue, grey, white, soft brown
Melissa Moretti.source_notes: Mentioned when she was looking at the new house.

Selena.primary_clothing: Victorian modest day dress with simple lace collar
Selena.face_description: Youthful, cheerful face with bright, deep brown eyes.
Selena.visual_anchor: Teenage female, almost 16, wine-red hair, deep brown eyes, cheerful expression, wearing a modest Victorian day dress.
Selena.color_palette: wine-red, deep brown, cream, pastel blue
Selena.source_notes: Text mentions her full name is Selena Wood and she is having her sixteenth birthday bash.

Mrs. Shaud.primary_clothing: Victorian morning gown or afternoon tea dress
Mrs. Shaud.face_description: typical Victorian middle-class lady, gentle but slightly haughty features
Mrs. Shaud.visual_anchor: 30s female, fair skin, neat brown updo, wearing a respectable Victorian morning gown
Mrs. Shaud.source_notes: Mentioned as a neighbor at 4 Daffodil Street making a formal visit. Physical traits guessed based on her middle-class status.

Mr. Shaud.face_description: serious and professional expression, sharp eyes
Mr. Shaud.visual_anchor: 40s male, fair skin, short neat greyish-brown hair, wearing a formal dark Victorian solicitor suit
Mr. Shaud.source_notes: Mentioned as a senior solicitor and husband of Mrs. Shaud. Physical traits guessed.

Wendy Smyrin.primary_clothing: modest Victorian dress, perhaps with an apron
Wendy Smyrin.face_description: wrinkled, kind face with a genial smile
Wendy Smyrin.visual_anchor: seventy-plus female, completely grayish-white hair, kind wrinkled face with a genial smile, wearing a modest Victorian dress
Wendy Smyrin.source_notes: Described with a head of gray hair and mentioned she moved from the South over 40 years ago.

Rozanne.hair_style: long brown hair (implied by girl description)
Rozanne.visual_anchor: Early 20s female, brown hair, light-brown eyes, bright forehead, wearing a light green Loen-style dress with white lace details.
Rozanne.color_palette: light green, brown, white, soft cream
Rozanne.source_notes: Text describes her as 'brown-haired' and mentions her changing into a cream-colored dress the next morning.

Royale Reideen.primary_clothing: Dark Victorian dress with subtle lace details, suitable for a Sleepless
Royale Reideen.face_description: cold expression, long and slender brows, large eyes
Royale Reideen.visual_anchor: Late 20s female, fair skin, long wavy black hair, calm expression, wearing a dark Victorian gown
Royale Reideen.source_notes: Directly described in the text during her encounter with Klein.

Old Neil.hair_style: white hair, likely short or medium as it fits under a felt hat
Old Neil.face_description: Deeply wrinkled face where the wrinkles bloom like flowers when he smiles; aged and expressive.
Old Neil.visual_anchor: elderly male, frail build, thinning white hair, wrinkled pale face, wearing worn Victorian clothing, surrounded by documents
Old Neil.distinguishing_features: Eyes turn pitch-black during specific ritualistic channeling
Old Neil.source_notes: Text explicitly states he is a Seer and mentions him rubbing a moonstone on his wrist. Also confirmed he earns 12 pounds a week but has a 30-pound debt.

Bredt.primary_clothing: Black top hat, charcoal grey Victorian civilian suit, white shirt, and a dark cravat
Bredt.face_description: A mature and friendly face defined by a thick, bushy black beard and slightly weathered features.
Bredt.visual_anchor: Mid-40s male, thick black beard, wearing a black top hat and a charcoal Victorian civilian suit.
Bredt.color_palette: deep black, charcoal grey, snow white, dark brown
Bredt.source_notes: Identified as a middle-aged civilian staff member with a thick black beard and top hat; celebrating his 15th wedding anniversary.
